problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: If Perovskite crystal structure optimization is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
